title: Rising Star was dead in a week
caption:
Rising Star was dead in a week works best when the reference lands immediately and needs no explanation. A deep-cut reference to The Electric Horseman, joking that the rescued show horse Rising Star would never have survived after being released into the wild. It is a strong fit for the electric horseman fans, robert redford fans, obscure movie joke fans, especially if A deep-cut reference to The Electric Horseman, joking that the rescued show horse Rising Star would never have survived after being released into the wild. is already familiar.

#thirdstringshirts #funnyshirts #movies

caption:

title: Ctrl + Alt + Country
caption:
Ctrl + Alt + Country works best when the reference lands immediately and needs no explanation. A mashup of the familiar Windows 'Ctrl + Alt + Delete' keyboard shortcut and the alt-country music genre, swapping 'Delete' for 'Country' to make a music-nerd tech pun. It is a strong fit for alt country fans, americana fans, people who like tech puns, especially if A mashup of the familiar Windows 'Ctrl + Alt + Delete' keyboard shortcut and the alt-country music genre, swapping 'Delete' for 'Country' to make a music-nerd tech pun. is already familiar.

title: Coloradans Against Craft Beer
caption:
Introducing the ultimate rebuttal to Colorado's craft beer madness. For those who'd rather sip water than swill another IPA, this t-shirt is your battle cry. Wear your disdain loudly and proudly.

Craft beer lovers can take a hike. It's time to rally against the hops hype. You know the deal.

#CraftBeerWho #ColoradansAgainst #Satire #BeerNotBeer

title: Coloradans Against Fourteeners
caption:
Join the movement against forty-some-thousand feet of sweaty elitism. Wear this T-shirt and make your sarcastic stance against Coloradan mountain worship known. Because some of us prefer to stay grounded.

#ColoradansAgainst #MountainsAreOverrated #SarcasmIncarnate

title: Coloradans Against Hiking
caption:
For every Coloradan who'd rather exchange views on microbrews than mountains. Wear your disdain for the trail on your sleeve (literally), and let’s reclaim the couch.

#ColoradansAgainstHiking #Colorado #Satire #CouchPotato #RegionalSarcasm

title: Coloradans Against Triathlons
caption:

#ColoradansAgainst #Triathlons #WitOverEndurance #SarcasticWear

caption:

caption:

caption:

title: Whip It
caption:
DEVO knew it: sometimes you just need to whip it real good. Park your seriousness at the curb and embrace your inner new wave rebel. Get yours before they’re gone—your wardrobe will thank you for the upgrade.

#WhipIt #DEVO #NewWaveNonsense

title: Breaking Wind
caption:
Turns out, ‘Breaking Wind’ is just as dangerous as blue meth. For fans of science... that smells funny. Grab yours before the farts get put on the periodic table. Because who needs chemistry when you can have comedy?

#BreakingWind #FartHumor #ThirdStringShirts #BreakingBad

title: Get the Flock Out
caption:
Because sometimes you just need a well-placed pun to make your point. Who knew sheep could be so offensive?

#GetTheFlockOut #PunnyBusiness #WittyWardrobe

title: Arizona state flag
caption:
Nothing screams 'I survived 120°F' like a t-shirt that’s just as obsessed with the Arizona state flag as your neighbor is with their cactus collection. Perfect for when you need to sum up your personality in one, slightly sweaty graphic.

#ProudlyMediocre #DesertDweller #ArizonaStateFlag

title: Ladies Love My Self Defecating Sense of Humor
caption:
Self-deprecation is so last season. Step up your humor game with a little self-defecation instead. Because who wouldn't want to share their affinity for poop jokes and primate antics? Get it before someone throws a banana at you! 🐒💩

#PoopJokes #MonkeyBusiness #NotSoLadiesChoice

title: My Other Car Is A Boat
caption:
Sure, my other car is a boat. And yes, it’s bigger than yours. Enjoy your sedan while I'm out here living the life aquatic. You know, like a sophisticated mer-man, only I wear this shirt instead of a trident. 🌊🚤

#BoatLife #AbsurdHumor #Transportation

title: Beer Before Liquor... Sailor's Delight
caption:
Because who needs the ocean when you’ve got a brew? ‘Beer before liquor’—a motto for those aiming to impress the fish with their poor decisions. Anchors away, my friends. 🥴⛵️

#SailingSass #DrinkingWisdom #BoatLife #WordplayWins

title: Bells Beach
caption:
Make your wardrobe as iconic as Keanu’s hair at Bells Beach. Perfect for those who appreciate 90s cinema and the art of aquatic crime—because who wouldn’t want to catch waves and rob banks simultaneously?

#PointBreak #SurfOrDie #90sNostalgia #KeanuForever

title: Beer Is Proof
caption:
For those who prefer suds to sermons. Let's toast to the miracles of fermentation, not divine intervention. Wear this at your next bar debate and watch the true believers squirm.

#ScienceNotFaith #CraftBeerHumor #ToastToFermentation #DryWit

title: Unemployment Fetish
caption:
Are you a proud couch potato? Abandon all hopes of gainful employment and embrace your true calling. Break out the snacks and the dusty remote. After all, someone’s gotta fulfill those low expectations. Let’s find out if there’s a fetish for this.

#UnemploymentFetish #SecondBestLife #CouchCruiser

title: Ctrl + Alt + Country
caption:
If your playlist needs a Ctrl + Alt + refresh, this shirt is for you. Rock your love for alt-country with a side of tech nerd vibes. Seriously, why be basic?

#CtrlAltCountry #MusicNerdFashion #AltCountryVibes

title: My Other Car Is A Boat
caption:
Let everyone know your other mode of transportation is a floating fortress of luxury. Perfect for those who prefer the open seas to the open road. Wear this with pride as you navigate life's absurdities—on water, of course. No need to explain; it's just a flex for people who get it.

#MyOtherCarIsABoat #FloatYourBoat #AbsurdHumor

title: Community Chest
caption:
Because sometimes the best property in Monopoly is the one you’re not buying. Perfect for those who appreciate double meanings with a side of juvenile humor. Wear it, share it, and let the community have its fun.

**Disclaimer:** No actual chest sharing included.
Get yours before someone else tries to monopolize it.

#CommunityChest #BoardGameBanter #DoubleEntendre #MonopolyMadness #WittyWear

title: Beer Is Proof
caption:
For those who think gravity and fermentation trump divine intervention. Because let’s face it, beer doesn’t just get you through the night—it scientifically validates your choices.

Grab this shirt, because wisdom is best celebrated with a cold one. Cheers to reality!

#ProofNotPiety #CraftBeerLogic #ThirdStringShirts

title: Coloradans Against Craft Beer
caption:
Are you tired of pretending to like the taste of hop-infused vinegar? Join the movement. Let’s stand together in this protest against the local craft beer cult. Perfect for when you need to make your distaste known at that next beer garden. Save the fermentation for kombucha, please. 25% off these gems until April 29—because sometimes, you need a shirt that does the talking for you.

Tag a Colorado friend who needs this reminder!

#ColoradansAgainst #CraftBeerApathy #BeerSnobbery

title: Coloradans Against Hiking
caption:
For every Coloradan who rolls their eyes at yet another hiking invitation. You know who you are. 🏔️ Let’s embrace the couch potato life with pride—better views come from a comfy chair anyway. Tag your hiking-obsessed friend!

#ColoradansAgainstHiking #CouchPotatoClub #RegionalSarcasm

title: Coloradans Against Hiking
caption:
Admit it, you’re just here for the beer and the views from your couch. Who needs elevation when you’ve got a good Netflix series to binge? Tag a friend who’d rather sip a craft brew than scale a mountain! 🍻⛰️

#AntiHiking #ColoradoHumor #OutdoorsNotRequired #CouchPotato #SierraNevada

title: Coloradans Against Hiking
caption:
Tag the friend who says hiking is relaxing and then packs like they are crossing the Andes. Today's position: glorified walking has gotten too confident. 25% off Coloradans Against shirts through tomorrow.

#ColoradansAgainst #ColoradoHiking #DenverHiking #ColoradoMemes

title: Coloradans Against Hiking
caption:
Tired of pretending a 10-minute walk to the ice cream truck counts as ‘outdoorsy’? This shirt’s for you. Next time someone suggests a weekend hike, remind them you uphold the sacred tradition of sitting still. Perfect for those who think trails are for deer, not humans. 🦌✋

#ColoradansAgainst #NotGoingOutside #HikingIsOverrated #AntiOutdoors #CouchLife

title: Coloradans Against Hiking
caption:
Hiking might be Colorado's favorite pastime, but let's be real—there are better ways to enjoy our state’s natural beauty without breaking a sweat. 👟✋ Perfect for the rest of us who appreciate WiFi over wilderness. Tag a hiking enthusiast and let the debates begin. 🤔

#ColoradansAgainst #TooCoolForTrails #IndoorLife #SarcasmCentral
